title: New Sakura Glutathione Whitening Cream Armpit Brightening Cream Body Lotion Pearl Moisturizer
detail_text: Sakura Glutathione Whitening Underarm Cream Armpit Brightening Cream Body Lotion Pearl Moisturizer 30g Diminishes Dark Spots Antioxidants Improves Dull Skin （1） What is it It is a whitening, moisturizing and deodorizing product carefully developed for underarm parts. It uses Japanese Cherry Blossom+5X Ceramide as the material. The Japanese Cherry Blossom Extract has strong anti saccharification, anti-oxidation, anti-inflammatory and other effects. At the same time, it can decompose melanin, so as to achieve whitening and yellowing effects. It can improve the skin from the base layer and directly hit the base layer. Improve the sunken muscles in the armpits. （2） What does it do Two color microcapsule pearl freshness locking: the microcapsule gel shell contains moisturizing factor, containing cherry essence, glutathione, Nicotinamide, Ceramide, helping to make your skin white, delicate and smooth A bottle containing 50+microencapsulated pearls: a 50 fold whitening booster that helps penetrate the basal layer of the skin, activate cells, regulate metabolism, and make dry and dull skin fair and hydrated, shining like pearls. （3） Applicable skin type Suitable for all skin types （4） Specifications Net weight: 30g （5） Main components Japanese evening cherry extract, 5X Ceramide, pink microcapsule pearl （6） Shelf life 36 months （7） Storage Instructions Please keep away from damp environment, direct sunlight and high temperature. Please store in a cool and dry place. Please use it as soon as possible after opening. （8） Package Content 1 * cherry blossom glutathione whitening underarm cream

product.highlights:
• This underarm whitening cream uses Japanese late-ripening cherry extract as the main ingredient. It has strong antioxidant and anti-glycation effects and has a good effect on whitening the skin.
  • Safe and non-irritating formula, a variety of pure natural plant extracts, whiten the skin while maintaining skin elasticity, and gently care for your skin.
  • It can be used to brighten skin color, decompose melanin, improve dull skin under armpits, fade dark spots and fine lines, and make skin smooth and fair.
  • Easy to use: Just apply an appropriate amount of whitening cream on the body and massage gently until absorbed, no tools required.

title: CeraVe Face Cream Moisturizing Lotion 236ml/473ml Fast shipping
seller_name: C e r a V e.S G.
detail_text: CeraVe Face Cream Moisturizing Lotion 236ml / 473ml is a very popular daily moisturizing and repairing lotion 🤍 It focuses on long-lasting hydration, repairing the skin barrier, and gentle moisturizing, suitable for daily face and body care ✨ The overall texture is a refreshing lotion, spreading easily on the face and absorbing quickly without feeling heavy or suffocating. Many people with sensitive and dry skin repurchase it regularly. ♡ Deeply moisturizes and hydrates 💧 Contains hyaluronic acid to help replenish skin moisture and reduce dryness and tightness. Especially comfortable to use in air-conditioned rooms, after staying up late, or during seasonal changes. ♡ Contains 3 ceramides Helps maintain the skin barrier ✨ Long-term use can improve dry, rough, and dehydrated skin, leaving it more stable and soft. ♡ Lightweight and Non-Greasy Texture The lotion spreads very smoothly and doesn't feel heavy or sticky on the face 🤍 Many people will love it for: • Not causing breakouts • Not sticky to hair • Absorbs quickly • Suitable for all seasons • Makeup applies better afterward ♡ Suitable for Sensitive Skin 🌿 The overall formula is gentle and suitable for: ✓ Sensitive skin ✓ Dry skin ✓ Combination-dry skin ✓ Damaged skin barrier ✓ Daily basic moisturizing care Many people also choose it for: • After using acid peels • During seasonal changes • When skin is unstable to stabilize and moisturize ✨ ♡ Can be used on face and body It can be used as a facial lotion and also as a body lotion 🫧 Especially suitable for dry and rough areas such as elbows, knees, and legs. ♡ User Experience After application, skin feels naturally soft and moisturized, without being overly oily. Long-term use leads to more stable and refined skin condition 🤍 Volume Options: • 236ml: More convenient for daily use and travel • 473ml: Larger capacity for longer lasting use, better value for the whole body ✨ Daily Skincare Recommendations: ☀️ Daytime: Cleanser → Moisturizer → Sunscreen 🌙 Evening: Cleanser → Moisturizer → Cream for intensive repair Fast Shipping 🚚 Fast shipping, making daily restocking easier～
detail_html:
CeraVe Face Cream Moisturizing Lotion 236ml / 473ml is a very popular daily moisturizing and repairing lotion 🤍 It focuses on long-lasting hydration, repairing the skin barrier, and gentle moisturizing, suitable for daily face and body care ✨

The overall texture is a refreshing lotion, spreading easily on the face and absorbing quickly without feeling heavy or suffocating. Many people with sensitive and dry skin repurchase it regularly.

♡ Deeply moisturizes and hydrates 💧 Contains hyaluronic acid to help replenish skin moisture and reduce dryness and tightness.

Especially comfortable to use in air-conditioned rooms, after staying up late, or during seasonal changes.

♡ Contains 3 ceramides

Helps maintain the skin barrier ✨ Long-term use can improve dry, rough, and dehydrated skin, leaving it more stable and soft.

♡ Lightweight and Non-Greasy Texture

The lotion spreads very smoothly and doesn't feel heavy or sticky on the face 🤍

Many people will love it for:

• Not causing breakouts

• Not sticky to hair

• Absorbs quickly

• Suitable for all seasons

• Makeup applies better afterward

♡ Suitable for Sensitive Skin 🌿

The overall formula is gentle and suitable for:

✓ Sensitive skin

✓ Dry skin

✓ Combination-dry skin

✓ Damaged skin barrier

✓ Daily basic moisturizing care

Many people also choose it for:

• After using acid peels

• During seasonal changes

• When skin is unstable

to stabilize and moisturize ✨

♡ Can be used on face and body

It can be used as a facial lotion and also as a body lotion 🫧 Especially suitable for dry and rough areas such as elbows, knees, and legs.

♡ User Experience

After application, skin feels naturally soft and moisturized, without being overly oily. Long-term use leads to more stable and refined skin condition 🤍

Volume Options:

product.desc:
CeraVe Face Cream Moisturizing Lotion 236ml / 473ml is a very popular daily moisturizing and repairing lotion 🤍 It focuses on long-lasting hydration, repairing the skin barrier, and gentle moisturizing, suitable for daily face and body care ✨

The overall texture is a refreshing lotion, spreading easily on the face and absorbing quickly without feeling heavy or suffocating. Many people with sensitive and dry skin repurchase it regularly.

♡ Deeply moisturizes and hydrates 💧 Contains hyaluronic acid to help replenish skin moisture and reduce dryness and tightness.

Especially comfortable to use in air-conditioned rooms, after staying up late, or during seasonal changes.

♡ Contains 3 ceramides

Helps maintain the skin barrier ✨ Long-term use can improve dry, rough, and dehydrated skin, leaving it more stable and soft.

♡ Lightweight and Non-Greasy Texture

The lotion spreads very smoothly and doesn't feel heavy or sticky on the face 🤍

Many people will love it for:

• Not causing breakouts

• Not sticky to hair

• Absorbs quickly

• Suitable for all seasons

• Makeup applies better afterward

♡ Suitable for Sensitive Skin 🌿

The overall formula is gentle and suitable for:

✓ Sensitive skin

✓ Dry skin

✓ Combination-dry skin

✓ Damaged skin barrier

✓ Daily basic moisturizing care

Many people also choose it for:

• After using acid peels

• During seasonal changes

• When skin is unstable

to stabilize and moisturize ✨

♡ Can be used on face and body

It can be used as a facial lotion and also as a body lotion 🫧 Especially suitable for dry and rough areas such as elbows, knees, and legs.

♡ User Experience

After application, skin feels naturally soft and moisturized, without being overly oily. Long-term use leads to more stable and refined skin condition 🤍

Volume Options:

• 236ml: More convenient for daily use and travel

• 473ml: Larger capacity for longer lasting use, better value for the whole body ✨

Daily Skincare Recommendations:

☀️ Daytime: Cleanser → Moisturizer → Sunscreen

🌙 Evening: Cleanser → Moisturizer → Cream for intensive repair

Fast Shipping 🚚 Fast shipping, making daily restocking easier～
